Name: KoRo
Description:
KoRo rethinks retail. Through bypassing trade levels, efficient processes and simply designed bulk packaging, the brand makes high-quality food available to everyone at fair prices. The range includes a wide variety of long-life, natural and processed foods as well as kitchen utensils and cooking accessories.

KoRo’s vision is to become Europe’s leading supplier of food, drink and kitchenware and products by consistently implementing its five basic principles: high quality, short supply chains, bulk packaging, fair prices and transparency. Customers have a clear insight into KoRo‘s trade proce...

Name: Upvest GmbH
Description:
Upvest is on a mission to make investing money as easy as spending it. The company empowers businesses to offer a wide range of investment products and the best experience in the field of capital market investment and retirement planning. Upvest’s Investment API is easy to integrate so that fintechs and enterprises alike can save resources and fully focus on their core business.

‍Upvest is one of the few fintechs in Europe that can provide its B2B clients with brokerage, settlement, and safe custody services across a full range of investment opportunities. The company was founded in 2017 by M...

Name: Enpal
Description: Designer and manufacturer of solar panels designed to make renewable energy accessible to everyone. The company digitizes the opaque solar market by providing personalized installation of solar systems that configures exactly the right solar panels based on customer information and all available technologies, enabling consumers to save money quickly and easily with green energy.

Name: Parloa
Description: Parloa is a Dialog Management System helping agile teams to create engaging conversations. You can build for Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, chat and phonebots in one place. We created Parloa as a solution to the problems we experienced while building conversational AI applications for multiple brands, across multiple channels. We help leading brands to manage their conversational AI experiences across all of their customer channels by offering a dialog layer for enterprises to unify their conversational AI strategy in a single hub - meaning no more silos. This helps structure dialogs for mult...

Name: LiveEO
Description: LiveEO is bringing Earth Observation to enterprise customers starting in the infrastructure sector. LiveEO utilizes satellite technology to monitor large infrastructure networks globally and empowers the operators to save operational expenses by observing dangers from external threats. By using AI, the company generates overviews of thousands of kilometers for decisions on the management level and information for the worker on the ground via a front-end and mobile app. LiveEO’s goal is to monitor every major infrastructure grid until 2025. The company has around 110+ employees and has offices ...

Name: AMBOSS GmbH
Description: AMBOSS empowers healthcare professionals around the world to perform to the highest medical standards. The company’s knowledge engine is built on the latest medical research and cutting-edge technology. A group of young doctors launched AMBOSS in 2012 as a one-stop medical education platform that promotes best-in-class outcomes. Today, more than 500,000 users all over the world rely on AMBOSS for learning, teaching and practicing medicine. The company’s international team has grown to more than 200 physicians and developers across offices in Germany and the US..

Name: Everphone AG
Description:
Smartphones have a crucial role in our lives and we ensure that our members always have a working phone.
The clou is, that we first send you a replacement device and you have enough time to organize your backup and stuff.
Is it broken or lost, whether stolen or lost during the last party, we will replace it immediately with the same phone type. Unbureaucratic and fast - without forms, declarations and waiting times.

Is your smartphone too old or you just want to have the latest flagship model? With everphone you get a discounted upgrade - because we take your old phone and turn it into cash...

Name: Payrails
Description: Payrails enables high-growth companies to craft their payment experiences and financial services globally. Our ledger-based operating system Payrails OS allows enterprises to build, operate, and scale payment acceptance and embed financial services without the need for a costly and complex in-house infrastructure. We are joined in our mission by top-tier investors Andreessen Horowitz and HV Capital to enable us to solve the growing complexity of payments.

Name: NetBird
Description:
NetBird is an open-source VPN management platform built on top of WireGuard® making it easy to create secure private networks for your organization.

NetBird creates an overlay peer-to-peer network connecting machines automatically regardless of their location (home, office, data-center, container, cloud, edge or IoT environments) unifying virtual private network management experience.

Name: LI.FI
Description:
LI.FI is building a DeFi middleware for the application layer. A bridge & DEX aggregation protocol abstracts away the most crucial financial infrastructure to move in and out of any position on any chain — the one gateway to access all DeFi.**

Whoever (e.g. TradFi) wants to deal with crypto today is forced to deal with a multi-chain environment. Even the most basic liquidity flow requires connecting RPCs, cross-chain bridges, DEXs and DEX aggregators, token lists, gas estimation APIs, and relayer networks. This already complex solution bears the additional need for monitoring, analytics, and ...

Name: Nelly Solutions GmbH
Description:
Nelly offers a digital patient check-in and check-out software that reduces 80% of paper and printing costs, 90 minutes spend on admin tasks and 30% of payment fees.

Therefore Nelly offers the following building blocks:

PATIENT CHECK-IN
Patients access our digital flow and complete the practice onboarding on their mobile devices. During the onboarding, Nelly assesses the patient's risk and based on the outcome immediately offers the respective payment method.

PRACTICE PORTAL
The practice staff can manage archived documents, send requests to sign documents through SMS or e-mail, and settl...

Name: CarOnSale
Description:
Our vision is to make automotive wholesale frictionless across Europe. We developed an innovative marketplace to connect buyers and sellers. We are ambitious, digital and reliable. We are committed to provide our customers with the easiest, most profitable and personal solution.

Together with our ambitious team, we set new standards in the remarking of used cars. We are looking for talents who believe in our vision and support us in the digitization of automotive wholesale. If you are looking for a place to realize your full potential and grow beyond your limits - COS is your place!

Name: omni:us
Description:
omni:us is a leading provider of AI-powered claims automation, helping insurers transform claims handling with measurable ROI from day one.
We enable both full end-to-end automation and smart decision support for claims handlers, ensuring faster, more accurate, and more customer-centric outcomes.

What we do:
. Capture and interpret claims communication – Ingest documents and messages (PDFs, forms, emails, handwritten notes) as the raw input.
. Validate completeness & coverage – Ensure all required information is present and perform both formal and substantive coverage checks. This step is whe...

Name: Project Eaden
Description:
Pioneering technology plus an immense love for life and food to create NEW EARTHLY PLEASURES: Full taste, zero guilt.

​

Name: Atai Life Science
Description:
Who we are:
atai is a biopharmaceutical company that leverages a decentralised platform approach to incubate and accelerate the development of highly effective mental health treatments that address the unmet needs of patients.

Our vision:
To heal mental health disorders so that everyone, everywhere can live a more fulfilled life.

Our approach:
By pooling expertise, best practices, and resources across our entire portfolio, we mitigate risk and responsibly accelerate the development of impactful and evidence-based treatments.

Name: Klim
Description:
Klim is a Berlin-based AgriTech company helping agri-food businesses transition their supply chains to regenerative farming practices at speed and scale, through a unique digital platform that empowers both farmers and supply chain partners on their journey toward a more resilient food system.

Regenerative practices focus on preserving and restoring soil health through a combination of proven, sustainable farming practices. While regenerative agriculture does not have a universal definition, Klim uses a definition that aligns with commonly used frameworks: a set of farming practices that aim ...

Name: Tapline
Description: Tapline supports early and growth-stage SaaS companies with growth capital, enabling them to trade their future subscriptions for upfront cash. It’s a fast, efficient, and non-dilutive way to capitalize a business in 48 hours.

Name: finmid
Description:
Leading software platforms use finmid to offer financing products to their business customers globally with a single integration. With finmid, platforms turn financial services into a growth lever and a competitive advantage.

We are builders at heart: nerdy, relentless, and obsessed with solving hard problems that others will not. We listen, dig deep, and use every opportunity to help platforms grow.

The future of capital access will be decided on product roadmaps, not bank steering committees. We are building the infrastructure behind it, fuelling the next decade of global growth for busine...

Name: Vivid Money
Description: The company's mission is to provide customers throughout Europe with a superior banking and investment experience and to offer a wide range of financial services (including savings accounts, multi-currency accounts and commission-free investments in stocks & cryptocurrency) without unnecessary fees.

Name: carbmee
Description: The Environmental Intelligence System, carbmee EIS™ is a carbon management platform for automated and holistic calculation of CO2 footprints on a product, company, and supply chain level. The platform is compliant with all international standards and is purpose-built for enterprises with complex supply chains to identify and unlock their maximum CO2 reduction potential.

Name: Raisin
Description: Raisin has built a global digital marketplace for deposits, providing customers access to higher-interest deposit products, while also enabling banks to diversify their funding in markets beyond their own.

Name: Choco
Description: We are a bunch of foodies and techies who are on a mission to reshape one of the oldest and biggest industries globally. We are simplifying how restaurants order from their suppliers and our technology has the potential to help millions of people globally to trade their goods in a digital and more efficient way.

Name: circula
Description: Circula is a B2B Software-as-a-Service company based in Berlin, Germany, offering companies an intuitive solution for employee expenses. The Circula software has been developed according to European tax standards and supports individualized expense and travel expense reporting to enable a seamless, uncomplicated, and tax compliant process. Circula was founded in 2017 by Nikolai Skatchkov and Roman Leicht. In total, the company was able to raise several million euros in debt capital from investors such as Capnamic Ventures, Main Inkubator, Wenvest, Finparx and HW Capital. Circula's circa 500 cu...

Name: hellomed.com
Description: hellomed is Germany’s leading e-pharmacy platform specialized in precription and medication management for professional care (b2b). With its digital solution hellomedOS, it enables safe, fast, and fully automated prescription and medication supply for nursing homes, homecare providers, and healthcare professionals.

Name: Synthflow AI
Description: Automate phone calls with extremely human-like Voice AI Agents at scale for medium and large sized companies.

Name: Ecoworks
Description: ecoworks is the first German provider of Net Zero modernization of apartment buildings. Net Zero modernizations rely on industrial prefabrication, modular construction and highly efficient energy systems to refurbish apartment buildings with up to four floors within a few weeks: calculated over the course of a year, a house modernized by us generates at least as much electricity as its tenants consume for space heating, hot water and household electricity.

Name: Apheris
Description:
Apheris is a deep tech company on the mission to fundamentally change how organizations collaborate securely and extract value from data. Our platform enables data scientists to train models and perform analyses on data owned by third-party organizations. Those organizations retain complete control over their data, and the privacy and intellectual property is fully preserved.
We empower multiple organizations with complementary data to jointly use the Apheris Platform to create an Apheris Data Ecosystem. These organizations can act as Data Owners and / or Data Consumers and together generate ...

Name: 7Learnings
Description: 7Learnings provides a software service to help e-commerce companies optimize their prices. Thanks to our algorithm, online retailers can save up to 10% of discounts while achieving the same revenue. This works by identifying and eliminating unnecessary discounts. At the same time, more discounts will be channeled into products with higher price elasticity. Our software also enables smaller pricing teams to use advanced retail pricing methods with our easy to use front-end.

Name: coachhub.com
Description:
Coachhub is the turnkey solution to support and transform employees of all career levels into fulfilled and inspired business contributors through digital coaching. A pool of almost 1,000 top coaches from more than 50 countries around the globe and the technical solution available for web and smartphone allow live coaching sessions via video conferencing, virtual learnings and measurable coaching progress.

This way we enable managers for better leadership, teams for better group performance and employees of any career level for personal and professional growth to support their organization's ...

Name: Ampersand UG
Description: Ampersand uses German and African engineers to bring China's electric vehicle revolution to Africa. Our range of vehicles includes electric bikes, mopeds, and tuk-tuks for cargo and people. Our prototypes are based on existing designs from China, and built by our Chinese partners - the world's biggest producers of electric vehicles. We are also developing a cheaper-than-petrol solar charger.

Name: Nuventura
Description:
Nuventura develops medium voltage (MV) gas insulated switchgear (GIS) technologies that replace Sulphur Hexafluoride (SF6) - the world's strongest greenhouse gas (GHG) - with dry air. Thus, developing a completely sustainable grid technology that contributes to the energy transition by tackling annual SF6 emissions that are equivalent to the yearly CO2 emissions produced by around 100 million cars, and also enabling for the technology’s full digitization.

Switchgear are key components of all electricity grids as they isolate and protect different nodes within the grid. GIS is a premium techno...

Name: Spryker Systems
Description: Spryker Systems offers highly efficient commerce technologies for a successful operation of digital transaction based business models. The technology is based on a framework with lightweight architecture, developed to be able to react quickly and flexibly on fast changing market conditions. The technology company with offices in Berlin and Hamburg was founded by serial entrepreneurs Alexander Graf and Nils Seebach in cooperation with the early stage investor and company builder Project A Ventures.

Name: Asana Rebel
Description: Yoga App

Name: saas.group
Description: We use a founder-friendly approach to improve the product and scale the team while maintaining the company’s original identity that drove its success.
